title: Neobinghamia × climaxantha
taxonomy: Neobinghamia × climaxantha is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to Australia, specifically in the Northern Territory. The species was first described in 2004. Neobinghamia × climaxantha is part of the genus Neobinghamia, which is a small group of plants within the Euphorbiaceae family. Neobinghamia × climaxantha is a rare and endemic species.
